comment: Hardware-only ABI probe. Reads one raw ctx[] word and turns a selected bit into an audible tone, without dereferencing unknown ctx pointers.
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter category. This is a diagnostic, not a musical effect.
fxid_comment: 0x0195, after StChorus in the custom Airwindows/probe id range.

params.name: Slot
params.comment: ctx[] index to inspect. Use 0-15 first; never dereferenced.

params.name: Bit
params.comment: Bit index inside the selected 32-bit ctx word.

params.name: Level
params.comment: Probe tone level. Keep modest when testing on hardware.
